articles.author: Gayoung Lee
articles.title: Scientists Think Africa May Be Cracking Along a New Tectonic Plate Boundary - Gizmodo
articles.description: If the rift keeps growing larger, the African continent could end up splitting in half, researchers say.
articles.content:
Earths mantle appears to be leaking a little along Central Africa. If this continues to develop, this rift could grow into a new tectonic plate boundarysplitting the African continent in half.
